insight: As you begin your learning journey, remember that every great accomplishment starts with a single step, and by completing your first session, you'll not only earn your first points, but also gain valuable insights into your strengths and areas for improvement. By focusing on making progress one session at a time, you can build a strong foundation, establish a consistent routine, and set yourself up for long-term success, so take that first step today and watch your momentum grow.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
